impact: Advances checkbox-20 with deterministic PP&D lifecycle fixture coverage derived only from the existing lifecycle source inventory, without live crawl, DevHub login, payment, submission, cancellation, or refund automation.
summary: Add a fixture-only cancellation/refund lifecycle process skeleton and a narrow validator for decisions, fee/payment gates, citation-backed gates, and stop gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-20: Add a minimal cancellation-and-refund lifecycle process skeleton fixture with user decisions, fee/payment gates, citation-backed action gates, and explicit stop gates from existing fixtures only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
